pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly specify 'new_community_stop'.
Task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly require a duration of 30.
Task instructions specify this output path, and setup_task.sh provisions the /home/ga/SUMO_Output directory.
Task instructions request the report to be saved at this path.
Confirmed by task setup scripts which deploy data to this directory.
Confirmed by directory contents mapped by setup_task.sh.
Confirmed by directory contents mapped by setup_task.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the 'Bologna Pasubio' SUMO scenario, which represents a real-world road network in Bologna, Italy (confirmed via UTM projection coordinates in the network file). The requested bus stop ID must be exactly 'new_community_stop' with a dwell time duration of '30' seconds, and output stop information and reports must be saved in '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/'. All necessary configuration and route files are deployed to '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/' by the environment setup script.
